title: Voidless Armory
description: Adding guns to minecraft in the classic 2d style
body:
**Disclamer**: This mod is still in the beta stage, please join the discord if you encounter any issues that aren't mentioned here
![purple thang](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
This mod adds a bunch of new guns to the game, all in a 2D art style that fits right in with the base game's look. Weapons are split into tiers, so you’ll start with older, simpler firearms and unlock more modern gear as you progress. It’s built to feel balanced and rewarding, whether you’re just surviving or diving deep into exploration.

One cool feature is the Dummy Gun System—it helps make the weapons work with mobs and other mods like MineColonies, so your NPCs and enemies can use them too. Just a heads-up: the mod’s still in beta, so expect bugs here and there. I’ve got a lot of updates planned, and I’m open to feedback and suggestions—especially for fixing bugs or adding features you’d like to see!
![purple thang](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
Usage:


Just hit R to reload if you have the appropriate ammo for it. What ammo goes to which gun will be explained further in a futire update but in short:

pistols use pistol ammo (except for tier 1)
mid range infantry uses 

![purple thang](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
 FAQ:


Q. What is the tier system?

A. To make it fit with survival playthroughs I locked the later guns behind an uncraftible part called the "Tier 2 Body" and "Tier 3 Body". As of now the tier 2 body is found in chests and the weaponsmith villager's trades and tier 3 need to be implamented still



Q. How to I give my gun to an npc like the Minecolonists?

A. The gun should convert automatically for the npc but if you ever want to switch them back and forth type /dummygun to pull up the gui



Q. What is a dummy gun?

A. The tldr is that minecraft has something I couldn't change to get mobs to hold them so theyre basicaly just reskinned bows. If I'm  being honest this is mainly just for role playing because it was impossible to have them use the normal guns
![purple thang](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)
Future Updates

More Guns (obviously)
Animations  for the player and guns
Implementing the Tier 3 weapons
